name: Family Golf and Learning Center
address: 3717 Tree Court Industrial Blvd, St. Louis, MO 63122
about: Family Golf and Learning Center is a comprehensive golf facility in St. Louis offering a wide range of services including a driving range, a 9-hole par 3 course, indoor TrackMan simulators, lessons, club fitting, and a full-service restaurant. The venue provides multiple ways for golfers to learn, practice, and play, with options ranging from casual bucket practice to simulator sessions and structured coaching. It caters to various skill levels with an emphasis on accessibility, featuring amenities like heated stalls, grass tees, and a fitness center, making it a one-stop destination for the local golf community.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology for advanced simulator sessions
Complete club fitting and repair services for optimizing equipment
Full-service Back Nine Bar and Grill with outdoor terrace
Encouraging and friendly atmosphere suitable for all skill levels
Year-round indoor and outdoor practice options
Dedicated junior golf programs and leagues

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant with a dining menu available

simulator_hardware.notes: 3 indoor simulators available for hourly bookings

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but rental clubs and club fitting services are also available on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned; however, the venue offers a full-service Back Nine Bar and Restaurant with its own menu.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: Simulator bookings are in 1-hour increments, so an 18-hole round would require booking multiple consecutive hours depending on the pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers dedicated junior golf programs, clinics, camps, and a par-3 course suitable for beginners and juniors.
